'''sanafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilspot|oilspot]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-n-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilspot|oilspot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sanafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sænæfæth|sænæfæth]] || [[word:sænæfæj|sænæfæj]] || [[word:sænæfæsh|sænæfæsh]] || [[word:sænæfæ|sænæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sananafath|sananafath]] || [[word:sananafaj|sananafaj]] || [[word:sananafash|sananafash]] || [[word:sananafa|sananafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sanafath|sanafath]] || [[word:sanafaj|sanafaj]] || [[word:sanafash|sanafash]] || [[word:sanafa|sanafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sanaffath|sanaffath]] || [[word:sanaffaj|sanaffaj]] || [[word:sanaffash|sanaffash]] || [[word:sanaffaf|sanaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sanafatha|sanafatha]] || [[word:sanafaja|sanafaja]] || [[word:sanafasha|sanafasha]] || [[word:sanafaka|sanafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sanafath|sanafath]] || [[word:sanafaj|sanafaj]] || [[word:sanafash|sanafash]] || [[word:sanafa|sanafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sanafathal|sanafathal]] || [[word:sanafajal|sanafajal]] || [[word:sanafashal|sanafashal]] || [[word:sanafakal|sanafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sanafathatha|sanafathatha]] || [[word:sanafajaja|sanafajaja]] || [[word:sanafashasha|sanafashasha]] || [[word:sanafaka|sanafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sanafathan|sanafathan]] || [[word:sanafajan|sanafajan]] || [[word:sanafashan|sanafashan]] || [[word:sanafakan|sanafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sanafathaoro|sanafathaoro]] || [[word:sanafajaoro|sanafajaoro]] || [[word:sanafashaoro|sanafashaoro]] || [[word:sanafakaoro|sanafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
